name: screenshotsmcp
description: Browser screenshots, UX/SEO/accessibility audits, visual diffs, and pre-commit/CI gates as a CLI any AI agent framework (Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, Continue, OpenAI Agents) can shell out to.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a viewport-only screenshot of a URL. Returns a public CDN image URL.

tools.name: fullpage
tools.description: Capture the full scrollable page as a single tall image.

args.name: --max-height
args.description: Cap output image height in pixels

tools.name: review
tools.description: Run an AI-powered UX review on a URL (accessibility / performance / SEO / content / mobile findings).

tools.name: seo
tools.description: Extract SEO metadata (title, meta description, OG tags, headings, structured data, robots).

tools.name: perf
tools.description: Get Core Web Vitals + performance metrics (LCP, FCP, CLS, TTFB).

tools.name: a11y
tools.description: Get the accessibility tree for a URL.

args.name: --full
args.description: Include all nodes, not just interactive

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Pixel-level visual diff between two URLs. Returns before/after/diff image URLs and a match score.

tools.name: check
tools.description: CI gate. Audits URLs from .screenshotsmcp/urls.json and exits non-zero when findings exceed the budget. Supports --report=github-comment for sticky PR comments.

tools.name: baseline-create
tools.description: Capture and store a baseline screenshot for visual regression.

tools.name: baseline-diff
tools.description: Re-capture a URL and diff against its stored baseline.

files.description: List of URLs the project cares about.
